title: Nursery Rhyme. LXIV. Tales.
content:
I'll tell you a story
            About Jack a Nory, - 
        And now my story's begun:
            I'll tell you another
            About Jack his brother, - 
        And now my story's done.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. LXIV. Tales." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
